commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Portion. Whence this was taken, whether from the tithes in general, or from the treasury of the temple, or from the revenue of the high priest, does not appear. (Calmet)
Fathers. The Levites might possess houses, suburbs, and cattle. (Menochius)
Hebrew, "besides that which ariseth from the sale of his patrimony. "(Haydock)
